articles.author: Ben Schoon
articles.title: Google Home will roll out Gemini upgrades more widely in Europe, Asia-Pacific this week - 9to5Google
articles.description: Following an announcement in early April, Google says that Gemini for Home upgrades are set to roll out more widely...
articles.content:
Following an announcement in early April, Google says that Gemini for Home upgrades are set to roll out more widely in Europe and Asia-Pacific nations this coming week.
Google Home chief Anish Kattu… [+1263 chars]
